name: ORAGENICS INC
business: Oragenics Inc is a development-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on researching and developing nasal delivery pharmaceutical therapies for neurological conditions and infectious diseases. Its lead product candidate is ONP-002, a synthetic neurosteroid for the treatment of mild traumatic brain injury (concussion). The company has no products approved for commercial sale and relies on third-party manufacturers for drug supply.
sellsTo: patients with mild traumatic brain injury (concussion)

exposures.sentence: Our lead product and focus are on the development and commercialization of ONP-002 for the treatment of mild traumatic brain injury ( mTBI or Concussion ).
The drug candidate is manufactured into a powder and filled into a novel intranasal device.

catalysts.sentence: US based clinical trial Estimated Q1 2027 start
Phase 3 clinical trial Estimated Q1 2028 start
